description: TUI currently auto-expands all project nodes showing their worktrees. Change behavior to make project nodes collapsible and default them to collapsed state on initial display
note: Successfully implemented collapsible project nodes with keyboard shortcuts (space, enter, left/right arrows). All projects default to collapsed state. Visual indicators (▸/▾) show expansion state.
acceptance_criteria: Project nodes should be collapsible/expandable with keyboard shortcut (e.g., space or right/left arrow)
Projects should default to collapsed state when TUI starts
Expand/collapse state should be tracked per project
Visual indicator (e.g., arrow) should show expand/collapse state
